calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-04-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-04-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Kathy Kollehner, CSR #4102.
Paul Arshawsky, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
Henry Kwan, property manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined by Mr. Arshawsky.
No appearance by defendant Earline Franklin.
The plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1: San Francisco Housing Authority Lease
Agreement dated 08/01/07....................................... ID/EV
Exhibit 2: Notice of Termination of Tenancy dated 12/13/07.................ID/EV

After hearing the testimony and evidence presented by the plaintiff, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority and against the Defendant EARLINE FRANKLIN as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from defendant EARLINE FRANKLIN costs in the amount of $85.00.
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 227 Bay Street, #315, San Francisco, CA 94133. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Henry Kwan, property manager, appeared on behalf of plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority; Paul Arshawsky, counsel for plaintiff

No appearance by defendant Earline Franklin

Settlement conference off calendar. Trial date remains.

Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk Linda Fong, not reported (218)
